subcodes.first_line: O thou martyr, son of the martyr, steadfast in the Covenant and Testament of God, which He established in the realm of eternity, from whence [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الشهید ابن الشهید الثابت علی عهد الله و میثاقه الذی اخذه فی ذر البقا عمن
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement
